text.title: Rust HTTP Handlers (Axum) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply rust-http-handlers end-to-end.

step.name: draft-dtos
step.action: Define typed request/response DTOs with validator derives.

step.name: wire-app-error
step.action: AppError variants → IntoResponse mapping; scrub public messages.

step.name: integration-test
step.action: Reqwest/Hyper test client hits real Axum router.
